item.g:title: Chronos
item.g:description: Chronos: The Paradox Engine is a game of thread-siphoning and timeline weaving. Players are Time-Weavers of a crumbling multiverse trying to buy historical nodes, alternate realities, temporal anchors—all in order to acquire the most chrono-points. If you weave enough stable threads, you might even trigger an event from an Anomaly at some point, which of course will further shake up the timeline and increase your chrono-points.
